name: COBRA Premium Assistance Credit

eligibility.description: Available to entities (employers, multiemployer plans, or insurers) that provided COBRA coverage without charging premiums to eligible individuals as required by ARPA 2021.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A refundable tax credit for employers or insurers equal to the amount of COBRA premiums not paid by assistance-eligible individuals under the American Rescue Plan Act.
